title: Non GATE CSE - Digital Signal Processing - Frequency Spectrum

questions.question:
A \( 1 \; \text{MHz} \) sinusoidal carrier is amplitude modulated by a symmetrical square wave of period \( 100 \; \mu \text{sec}. \) Which of the following frequencies will not be present in the modulated signal ?



Digital Signal Processing: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 109
